publicKey.description: base64url raw Ed25519 identity key (32 bytes); verifies this node's CMB signatures (§18.3.1)

e2ePublicKey.description: base64 X25519 key for end-to-end field encryption (§18.2.1)

group.description: The node's mesh group; the §5.8 isolation boundary. Absent ⇒ 'default' (§5.2).

lifecycleRole.description: Senders MUST include it (§5.2); receivers treat absence as participant. Self-declared: an elevated role is honored only with a signed role-grant (§6.6).
